untranslatable_reason: Pattern requires precise multi-peak detection with specific time separation (51-55 days between highest highs) and amplitude matching (0-3% difference). This requires peak-finding logic and cross-bar analysis across 51-55 candles that cannot be expressed with single-candle indicator comparisons. The core reversal signal is approximated via overbought price position and RSI at resistance, but true EADT pattern structure cannot be encoded without custom pattern recognition logic.
